name: Hybrid Cloud Solutions
description: T Cloud Hybrid kombiniert Private- und Public-Cloud mit zentralem Governance-Framework, Multi-Cloud-Konnektivitätsplattform (MCCP), branchenspezifischen Varianten (Health Hybrid Cloud) und cloudübergreifender Automatisierung.

issues.detail: Portfolio language is 'en' but description is written in German.
Governance framework and MCCP overlap with multi-cloud-finops. Private Cloud component overlaps with private-cloud feature. Feature boundaries are not well-defined.
Describes architectural composition but not why a customer would choose this — what pain does it solve? What outcome does it enable?
Missing fields: product, created, status, differentiators, use_cases.
'branchenspezifischen Varianten' only names one example (Health). If there are more, list them; if not, clarify scope.
